markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content workflows, review processes, and LLM-focused strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/z_-Gxczx4MxwpgdQjU835BZPP6tXoAXQ?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Airtable Interface:** A new Airtable interface will centralize Logic's content review, replacing email notifications with Slack tags and enabling direct approvals to streamline the workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/z_-Gxczx4MxwpgdQjU835BZPP6tXoAXQ?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [**Workflow Embeds:** The first 24 vetted workflows from Logic's industry pages will be manually embedded in blog posts, with Azzam creating a Logic doc to automate selection.](https://fathom.video/share/z_-Gxczx4MxwpgdQjU835BZPP6tXoAXQ?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)
  - [**LLM-First Strategy:** The team will test adding per-article FAQs to boost LLM visibility and use Scrunch's "unranked questions" feature to find high-intent, long-tail content opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/z_-Gxczx4MxwpgdQjU835BZPP6tXoAXQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
  - [**Positive Performance:** Impressions hit an all-time high, and LLM citations are trending up, validating the content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/z_-Gxczx4MxwpgdQjU835BZPP6tXoAXQ?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance & LLM Strategy

  - [**Performance Update:**](https://fathom.video/share/z_-Gxczx4MxwpgdQjU835BZPP6tXoAXQ?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)
      - [Impressions reached an all-time high.](https://fathom.video/share/z_-Gxczx4MxwpgdQjU835BZPP6tXoAXQ?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)
      - [Total query volume is growing, which temporarily lowers CTR as Google explores new search results.](https://fathom.video/share/z_-Gxczx4MxwpgdQjU835BZPP6tXoAXQ?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)
      - [LLM citations are trending up, a positive signal that Logic is being found by AI.](https://fathom.video/share/z_-Gxczx4MxwpgdQjU835BZPP6tXoAXQ?tab=summary&timestamp=965.0)
  - [**LLM Citation Tracking:**](https://fathom.video/share/z_-Gxczx4MxwpgdQjU835BZPP6tXoAXQ?tab=summary&timestamp=986.0)
      - [**Problem:** The Scrunch tool incorrectly cites the common noun "logic" (lowercase L) as the brand.](https://fathom.video/share/z_-Gxczx4MxwpgdQjU835BZPP6tXoAXQ?tab=summary&timestamp=986.0)
      - [**Action:** Bailey will ask Scrunch to filter for proper noun usage only.](https://fathom.video/share/z_-Gxczx4MxwpgdQjU835BZPP6tXoAXQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1109.0)
      - [**New Issue:** ChatGPT has been observed recommending "Logic.ai" (a dormant domain) instead of Logic.inc.](https://fathom.video/share/z_-Gxczx4MxwpgdQjU835BZPP6tXoAXQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)
      - [**Action:** Bailey will ask Scrunch to track these specific misattributions.](https://fathom.video/share/z_-Gxczx4MxwpgdQjU835BZPP6tXoAXQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
  - [**LLM-First Content Tactics:**](https://fathom.video/share/z_-Gxczx4MxwpgdQjU835BZPP6tXoAXQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
      - [**Per-Article FAQs:**](https://fathom.video/share/z_-Gxczx4MxwpgdQjU835BZPP6tXoAXQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)
          - [**Rationale:** To improve LLM visibility by providing direct answers to common questions.](https://fathom.video/share/z_-Gxczx4MxwpgdQjU835BZPP6tXoAXQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)
          - [**Decision:** Make this a standard practice.](https://fathom.video/share/z_-Gxczx4MxwpgdQjU835BZPP6tXoAXQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)
      - [**Scrunch's "Unranked Questions" Feature:**](https://fathom.video/share/z_-Gxczx4MxwpgdQjU835BZPP6tXoAXQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
          - [**Rationale:** To find high-intent, long-tail questions where Logic could rank.](https://fathom.video/share/z_-Gxczx4MxwpgdQjU835BZPP6tXoAXQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
          - [**Action:** Bailey will pull a list of these questions for Logic to evaluate as potential content topics.](https://fathom.video/share/z_-Gxczx4MxwpgdQjU835BZPP6tXoAXQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)

### Workflow & Review Process

  - [**Problem:** The current review process is inefficient, with approvals communicated via ad-hoc Slack messages.](https://fathom.video/share/z_-Gxczx4MxwpgdQjU835BZPP6tXoAXQ?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [**Solution:** A new Airtable interface will centralize content review.](https://fathom.video/share/z_-Gxczx4MxwpgdQjU835BZPP6tXoAXQ?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
      - [**Notifications:** Automated Airtable emails will be replaced with direct Slack tags to ensure timely action.](https://fathom.video/share/z_-Gxczx4MxwpgdQjU835BZPP6tXoAXQ?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
      - [**Approvals:** Azzam will use a new "Articles in Review" view to approve content directly within Airtable, providing a clear, trackable status.](https://fathom.video/share/z_-Gxczx4MxwpgdQjU835BZPP6tXoAXQ?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
  - [**Workflow Embeds:**](https://fathom.video/share/z_-Gxczx4MxwpgdQjU835BZPP6tXoAXQ?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)
      - [**Source:** The first 24 vetted workflows from Logic's industry pages (6 per page) will be used.](https://fathom.video/share/z_-Gxczx4MxwpgdQjU835BZPP6tXoAXQ?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
      - [**Automation:** Azzam will create a Logic doc to automate workflow selection for future content.](https://fathom.video/share/z_-Gxczx4MxwpgdQjU835BZPP6tXoAXQ?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [**Implementation:** growthx.ai will manually embed 2 workflows per post for a few weeks to test the process before full automation.](https://fathom.video/share/z_-Gxczx4MxwpgdQjU835BZPP6tXoAXQ?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)

### Content Pipeline & Scheduling

  - [**Publishing Cadence:**](https://fathom.video/share/z_-Gxczx4MxwpgdQjU835BZPP6tXoAXQ?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
      - [**Decision:** Stagger publishing to one article per day to avoid overwhelming readers.](https://fathom.video/share/z_-Gxczx4MxwpgdQjU835BZPP6tXoAXQ?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
      - [**Implementation:** Bailey will manually schedule articles for the next few weeks to ensure quality control.](https://fathom.video/share/z_-Gxczx4MxwpgdQjU835BZPP6tXoAXQ?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [**Content Runway:**](https://fathom.video/share/z_-Gxczx4MxwpgdQjU835BZPP6tXoAXQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1502.0)
      - [**Status:** The pipeline is sufficient for next week, using a new "agentic" pipeline that improves research and context.](https://fathom.video/share/z_-Gxczx4MxwpgdQjU835BZPP6tXoAXQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1502.0)
      - [**Action:** Azzam will review the topic backlog in the new Airtable interface to provide a longer-term forecast.](https://fathom.video/share/z_-Gxczx4MxwpgdQjU835BZPP6tXoAXQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/z_-Gxczx4MxwpgdQjU835BZPP6tXoAXQ?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
      - [Configure Airtable to send review notifications via Slack tags.](https://fathom.video/share/z_-Gxczx4MxwpgdQjU835BZPP6tXoAXQ?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
      - [Build the "Articles in Review" Airtable interface for direct approvals.](https://fathom.video/share/z_-Gxczx4MxwpgdQjU835BZPP6tXoAXQ?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
      - [Ask Scrunch to filter LLM citations for proper noun usage and track "Logic.ai" mentions.](https://fathom.video/share/z_-Gxczx4MxwpgdQjU835BZPP6tXoAXQ?tab=summary&timestamp=986.0)
      - [Pull a list of "unranked questions" from Scrunch for Logic's review.](https://fathom.video/share/z_-Gxczx4MxwpgdQjU835BZPP6tXoAXQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
      - [Update the content pipeline to include per-article FAQs.](https://fathom.video/share/z_-Gxczx4MxwpgdQjU835BZPP6tXoAXQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)
      - [Manually schedule approved articles for staggered publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/z_-Gxczx4MxwpgdQjU835BZPP6tXoAXQ?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [**Azzam:**](https://fathom.video/share/z_-Gxczx4MxwpgdQjU835BZPP6tXoAXQ?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)
      - [Compile the list of 24 vetted workflows and share it with growthx.ai.](https://fathom.video/share/z_-Gxczx4MxwpgdQjU835BZPP6tXoAXQ?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
      - [Build a Logic doc to automate workflow selection.](https://fathom.video/share/z_-Gxczx4MxwpgdQjU835BZPP6tXoAXQ?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [Review and approve/reject topics in the Airtable backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/z_-Gxczx4MxwpgdQjU835BZPP6tXoAXQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1502.0)
